# DataFlow

DataFlow is our data pipeline automation platform currently in beta.

## Overview
DataFlow simplifies building and managing ETL pipelines. Connect your data
sources, transform with SQL or Python, and load into any destination.

## Key Features
- Visual pipeline builder with drag-and-drop interface
- Support for 50+ data sources and destinations
- Real-time and batch processing modes
- Built-in data quality monitoring

## Beta Status
DataFlow is currently in beta with select customers. We're actively
gathering feedback and iterating on the product.

## Roadmap
- Q2 2025: General availability
- Q3 2025: Enterprise tier with SLA
- Q4 2025: Self-hosted deployment option
